inputs.description:
Run Wikipedia enrichment Pass 2 — fetch article summaries for all cached agents.

cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.batch_wikipedia --pass 2 --db data/index/bibliographic.db

This fetches 2-3 paragraph summaries and extracts name variants. Takes ~45 minutes.

Verify:
  python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); s=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM wikipedia_cache WHERE summary_extract IS NOT NULL').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Summaries: {s}')"
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); s=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM wikipedia_cache WHERE summary_extract IS NOT NULL').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Summaries: {s}')"
